title: Microtek International is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Microtek International is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? Microtek International in Ahmedabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Microtek International:
Microtek International is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microtek International!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
